mysql	c16f24f908846019a741db580f6545a5933e9435a7cf1579c50794a6ca287739	SELECT COALESCE(`schema_name`, ''), COALESCE(`digest`, ''), COALESCE(`digest_text`, ''), `count_star`, `sum_timer_wait` FROM performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest WHERE `last_seen` >= NOW() - INTERVAL 60 second	6	1021919000
